title: The Key to Power
writer: Caroline Gentry (screenplay), Caroline Gentry (story), E. Lloyd Sheldon (screenplay), E. Lloyd Sheldon (story)
actors: Hugh Thompson, Claire Adams, J.H. Gilmour, Frazier Nounnan
plot: Bruce Wendell, the son of West Virginia coal mine owner James Wendell, graduates from West Point and prepares to lead a fighting unit to the front during World War I. As his father lies ...
